Sitemap

This page summarizes the published site structure so users can understand where each part of the system lives.

Go to home Contact Rotata
01

Context

Introduction

The site is organized from context to system to action so readers can move from understanding to decision without dead ends.

02

Operating model

Main navigation structure

The primary navigation groups the site around the operating model.

Home
About
Solutions
Services
System
Partners
Insights
Contact
Legal
03

Operating model

About section links

About pages explain company stance, values, mission, process and cases.

/about/
/about/values/
/about/mission/
/about/process/
/about/cases/
04

Operating model

Solutions links

Solution pages explain how Rotata addresses the main operating breaks.

/solutions/
/solutions/pipeline/
/solutions/intelligence/
/solutions/conversion/
/solutions/alignment/
05

Operating model

Services links

Service pages describe the capability layers that make the system work.

/services/
/services/crm/
/services/data/
/services/outbound/
/services/signals/
/services/sales/
06

Operating model

System links

System pages explain architecture, workflows, automation, reporting and integrations.

/system/
/system/workflows/
/system/automation/
/system/reporting/
/system/integrations/
07

Operating model

Insights links

Insights routes organize the editorial library and ROI framing.

/insights/
/insights/blog/
/insights/roi/
08

Operating model

Contact links

Contact routes are available for direct inquiry or a more structured consultation.

/contact/
/contact/consult/
09

Operating model

Legal links

Legal pages cover privacy, cookies, accessibility, sitemap, robots and the main legal notice.

/legal/
/legal/privacy/
/legal/cookies/
/legal/accessibility/
/legal/sitemap/
/legal/robots/
10

Context

Navigation guidance

Overview pages explain the model, detail pages explain one capability, and contact routes exist when a diagnostic conversation is the next sensible step.

Use contact if the right route is unclear

Consulta

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
